title: Reusable Infographic

imagePrompts.prompt: Create a reusable infographic diagram with structured infographic diagram with English labels, clean arrows, and data-poster readability. Detailed exploded-view diagram of a Sony A7 mirrorless camera, with all internal components separated and clearly visible, each part labeled with its. Technical product illustration style, clean white background, precise and informative layout. exploded or cutaway structure. annotation/callout logic Subject Object: fictional compact mirrorless camera body. Component System: lens mount, sensor plate, shutter unit, processor board, battery chamber, and weather seals. Annotation Style: tiny clean labels, leader lines, numbered component callouts, and subtle measurement marks. Material Finish: matte black alloy, glass, rubber grip, brushed metal screws, and transparent cutaway layers. Background Style: minimal warm-gray studio board with soft shadows and editorial product-diagram spacing. Precision Rule: components align on one exploded axis with believable scale and no real brand logos. Subject: Make fictional compact mirrorless camera body the clear hero subject. Preserve the source prompt's subject hierarchy and avoid adding unrelated people or props. Scene and Context: Place the subject in minimal warm-gray studio board with soft shadows and editorial product-diagram spacing. Keep the background details useful to the concept rather than decorative filler. Composition and Layout: Use lens mount, sensor plate, shutter unit, processor board, battery chamber, and weather seals. Keep the layout faithful to this template's own visual mechanic and do not introduce unrelated layout systems. Style and Rendering: Render in matte black alloy, glass, rubber grip, brushed metal screws, and transparent cutaway layers. Keep this template's fixed material, texture, camera, illustration, or UI finish consistent across variants. Color and Lighting: Use high-contrast educational colors that keep labels, parts, and arrows legible. Lighting should match the template mood, separate the hero subject from the background, and stay readable at thumbnail size. Visible Typography: English-only, Latin alphabet only. Use one concise English headline or short English labels only when the template needs visible writing; otherwise keep visible writing minimal, intentional, and clean. Quality Restrictions: Avoid random letters, watermarks, malformed hands or faces, broken anatomy, duplicate logos, noisy background clutter, unreadable microcopy, and off-style artifacts.
